channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: How much interest will a $150,000 CD account earn now?
item.description: The interest earnings on a CD of this size will be significant (and they'll be available relatively quickly, too).

item.title: Confirmed hantavirus cases linked to suspected cluster rises to 5, WHO says
item.description: The total number of hantavirus cases in the suspected outbreak aboard the cruise ship MV Hondius has risen to five, according to the World Health Orga...

item.title: Trump threatens Iran strikes, says it's too soon for new direct talks
item.description: Trump threatens Iran with "higher level" strikes if it won't accept a peace deal, but says it's too soon for direct talks after reporting diplomatic p...

item.title: Iran live updates: Trump threatens 'the bombing starts' if Iran doesn't make a deal
item.description: President Donald Trump first announced Project Freedom on Sunday in a post, promising the Navy would "guide their Ships safely out of these restricted...
